goal: Add a standard real trained adapter Docker endpoint evidence capture tool so the remaining M6-RC blocker can be closed reproducibly when a real CUDA lora_adapter image/artifact is available. The tool must run exported Docker runtime without MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND, verify read-only model-cache mount, capture /healthz, /agents/{agent_id}/run, and /v1/chat/completions transcripts, write the exact GO markers consumed by scripts/verify_m6_rc_evidence.py, and include self-test coverage. This gate does not provide a real adapter and must preserve current M6-RC NOT_GO.
head: 159bfb7
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Running fake-backend endpoint evidence as RC GO evidence
Claiming M6-RC GO before real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add endpoint evidence capture tooling, focused tests, a generated tooling evidence note, and handoff updates only.
required_evidence: Capture tool documents and enforces no MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND env in Docker run
Capture tool writes GO markers expected by verify_m6_rc_evidence.py
Self-test covers evidence marker shape without claiming real endpoint success
M6-RC remains NOT_GO because real endpoint evidence file is not generated from a live real adapter
warnings: This gate does not provide a real trained adapter.
This gate does not run a real Docker endpoint transcript.
M6-RC remains NOT_GO until the capture tool is run against a real trained adapter export without MIB_RUNTIME_ALLOW_FAKE_BACKEND.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped tooling contract for real adapter endpoint evidence capture.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING.md, verify_m6_rc_evidence.py, M6 review docs, and current evidence. Confirmed the remaining blocker is real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint and no standard capture script exists.
phase_notes.build: Add capture script, tests, and tooling evidence without changing product runtime behavior.
phase_notes.check: Contract JSON validation, capture/verifier py_compile, focused script tests, capture self-test, M6 RC verifier, generated JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed.
phase_notes.done: Capture tooling and evidence note are recorded. The self-test produces marker-shaped evidence with self_test true and verify_m6_rc_evidence.py rejects self-test evidence as RC GO. Current M6-RC remains NOT_GO until live real adapter endpoint evidence is generated.

pabcd.approved_scope: Endpoint evidence capture tooling, focused tests, generated tooling evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no M6 GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
